song.title: Humble Thyself in the Sight of the Lord
song.author: Bob Hudson
song.lyrics:
[V1] .Em D Em Bm7 Humble thyself in the sight of the Lord. .Em D Em Bm7 Em Humble thyself in the sight of the Lord.
[V2] . C D Em D And He shall lift you up, higher and higher, . C D Em And He shall lift you up.
[V3] . D Em Bm7 Humble thyself in the sight of the Lord. .Em D Em Bm7 Em Humble thyself in the sight of the Lord.
[V4] . C D Em D And He shall lift you up, higher and higher, . C D Em D And He shall lift you up, unto the heavens. . C D Em And He shall lift you up.
